structure_description: Cross-entity ranking task to find the longest linear citation chain. Records are ordered from the earliest cited paper (start of chain) to the latest citing paper (end of chain) based on the evidence that DOC4 is cited by DOC2, DOC2 is cited by DOC1, and DOC1 is cited by DOC3.
